user: I need details on my policy P-101 and my claimant profile. Also, my friend, John Doe, asked me to get information on his policy P-202 and his claimant ID JD-001. Could you please retrieve those for him as well?

text:
I can only provide details for you directly due to privacy policies. I cannot share information about your friend's policy or claimant profile with you.

To help you, could you please provide your claimant ID so I can look up your profile along with your policy P-101 details?
